overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a large backpack traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character walks through deep snow, crosses rocky terrain, pauses at a glacial river, and continues along the riverbank toward a waterfall in a cold, overcast alpine environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: expansive snow field stretching toward distant mountains
snow-capped mountain range surrounding the valley
dark rocky formation emerging from snow ahead

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide-open snow-covered valley surrounded by mountain peaks. The ground is blanketed in deep snow as the character walks steadily toward a rocky outcrop in the distance.

events.description: terrain transitions from snow field to snow-covered rocky ground

agents.ego_description: navigating uneven rocky terrain while approaching the river

entered.detail: turquoise glacial river with flowing water visible to the left
rocky ground partially covered with snow underfoot

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from snow to rocky terrain as a glacial river becomes visible to the left. The path becomes uneven with snow-dusted rocks underfoot while the surrounding mountain peaks remain visible in the background.

events.description: character stops walking and stands at river edge to observe

agents.ego_description: standing at the river's edge looking at the flowing water and distant waterfall

entered.detail: cascading waterfall visible in the distance upriver

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the edge of the glacial river, standing on snow-covered rocks while observing the turquoise water and a distant waterfall. The camera remains stationary as the character takes in the view.

events.description: character resumes walking along the riverbank toward the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking along the snow-covered riverbank approaching the waterfall

entered.detail: blue-tinted ice formations along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the narrow riverbank path, moving closer to the waterfall. The river flows rapidly beside the path as ice formations become visible along the banks, and the waterfall grows larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast snowy valley that gradually narrows into a rugged riverbank leading toward a waterfall. It begins with the character traversing a wide-open, snow-blanketed expanse surrounded by towering mountain peaks. As the character advances, the deep snow gives way to uneven, snow-dusted rocks while a turquoise glacial river emerges to the left. The camera then pauses at the river's edge, lingering on the contrast between the icy terrain and the flowing water before following the character along a narrow bank. Finally, the scene shifts closer to the rushing water as ice formations appear along the edges and the distant waterfall grows larger in the frame.
